title: aster subulatus var. australis
intro: Aster subulatus var. australis, also known as the southern star or prairie aster, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Aster subulatus var. australis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, calm skin irritations, and provide antioxidant properties. Aster subulatus var. australis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
